ads.author: William Latimer
ads.title: Vintage Gottlieb Hi-Diver Pinball Machine
ads.description: Vintage Gottlieb Hi-Diver pinball machine. Has a pool theme with diver artwork. The machine is not working, has some rust and wear. The cabinet has some damage and the paint is faded. The glass is intact.

ads.author: Josh Peoples
ads.title: Harley arcade game
ads.description: Really nice arcade machine. It has a lot of different games on it like pac man, donkey Kong, and space invaders just to name a few. I simply never use the thing and I could use the extra space. Pretty firm on the price at $750. No trades.

ads.author: Tammy Thomas
ads.title: Ultimate Legend/W Stand
ads.description: I’m selling to get my bucket list Video Game It will make a awesome Christmas Have any questions please ask! Why so much? Ask and I’ll tell you why!!! $675.00 OBO

ads.author: Carlo Alaia
ads.title: Williams Aces n Kings pinball
ads.description: 1970 vintage pinball machine in working condition, 4 player game with new bands, all lights working, all features scoring, backglass in nice shape, plays well

ads.author: Jamie Boyd
ads.title: Game of Thrones Pinball Playfield - NOS - Never Populated - Mint!
ads.description: New - never populated. Game of Thrones Playfield. This is from the factory, and as good as the day it was delivered. Let me know if you have questions!

ads.author: Aaron Eppinett
ads.title: Suzuka 8 hours 2
ads.description: This arcade machine is in fair condition. Both sides play. The left screen needs a cap kit and the left bike needs some internal work. The left bottom side of the cabinet is torn up. I will take more pics and put a link to my Google photos. I can deliver for a fee. 400 obo need gone to make space.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $325 OBO Capcom Bowling upright cabinet. Condition: • Cabinet is very old and needs some love. • Monitor powers on, image is good, but probably needs new caps for long-term reliability. • Lights come on. • Sound works. • Controls are functional. • Sold as-is. • Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Quez Bush
ads.title: Video games
ads.description: Trying to get rid of these video game ASAP if you interested call [hidden information]

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Price: $375 (or best offer) Not the original dedicated cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Nic Landers
ads.title: San Francisco Rush Arcade Game
ads.description: Arcade Game is in working condition and functions as it should, only getting rid of it because it never gets played. There are wheels on the bottom which makes it easy to roll around and fits through doorways. Asking $400.00 obo. would rather sale than trade but may be willing to trade.

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine.

ads.author: thepita007
ads.title: Super Mario Bros. Pinball Cab Art
ads.description: Purchased years ago didn't end up using it. Asking 150.00

ads.author: Warren Kenny
ads.title: Shadow Pinball Playfield & Protector
ads.description: CPR gold shadow playfield with playfield Protector included. Nevwr installed If you have any questions, please let me know. Thanks!

ads.author: Zain Madanat
ads.title: Mr. Do Arcade game, Extremely Rare
ads.description: I have a working Mr. Do arcade game. It is extremely rare must pick up in Brandon area.

ads.author: Jon Sutcliffe
ads.title: Centuri Gyruss Arcade Game
ads.description: This is an original working 1983 Centuri Gyruss arcade game with a 19" CRT. 100% working - No issues - All works as it should This was in an arcade for some of its 43 year history. It's not perfect but pretty nice and very clean. Look at video and pictures, ask for more. If you're local, come to look it over and play a few games! Owner's manual and schematics are in backdoor pocket. Keys and locks for coin door and backdoor. Set to free play but can be configured to accept quarters or tokens. (Quarter coin mechs are included) All Original: - Gryuss PCBs and wiring harnesses - G07-CBO 19"CRT and chassis - Marquee and Bezel - Side art - Joystick New: - Control Panel Overlay art - Buttons - Message me to discuss game details, ask for more pictures, videos. - Prefer local pickup so you can see it and play it. I will help load. - Will ship if you make all shipper arrangements - Can deliver ~locally to your door for a fee. No stairs or other adventures. Make me an offer! Cash or PayPal. No Checks. I will consider trade for a pinball.

ads.author: MilitiaMan
ads.title: Williams System 11b Pinball Transformer (Tested, Working)
ads.description: Used, good condition - “This is a fully tested and working pinball transformer pulled from a Williams Police Force. This transformer will work with other Williams System 11b pinball machines as it outputs...”

ads.author: MilitiaMan
ads.title: Capcom Pinball Transformer XF00105 (Tested, Working)
ads.description: Used, good condition - “This is a fully tested and working pinball transformer from a Capcom Breakshot. This transformer will likely work with other Capcom pinball machines as it outputs the correct volta...”

ads.author: Tyler Martinez
ads.title: NFL Blitz Arcade Machine
ads.description: NFL blitz 4 player arcade game. Works as it should. Been sitting outside covered so it has some dust and pollen build up but I will clean it before purchase. Game does work though. Kids just dont play it. Will have to pick up. Price is OBO

ads.author: Lee Barnett
ads.title: Adams family arcade machine missing parts
ads.description: This came in a bundle deal looking to recover cost only missing 2 boards and play field spinner by the looks of it but may be missing more . Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.author: Shane Starr
ads.title: Hang On Project Cab
ads.description: Non working project cab. Cabinet is in great shape but someone stuck an LCD inside with a VGA connection. Includes the board but gets artifacting on power up / display. Board could be repaired.

ads.author: Cory Anderson
ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Trussville Woodworks
ads.title: ARCADE GAME
ads.description: Dual seat SEGA GT racer. Old style arcade. Collector's item. Needs TLC but works great. One wheel needs shimmed to use.

ads.author: Sekou Miller
ads.title: Fast furious arcade game-AVAILABLE
ads.description: Awesome sound and works great/would be awesome in any man cave!! There appears to be lines on the screen in this video. There are no visible lines but it appears only while recording. ATTENTION-The price have been reduced to $800 to allow for you to rent the electric stair dolly- i will not reduce price and will not accept to sell without the buyer using an electric dolly. ALSO-no more will I place item on "hold"/"pending" without a deposit

ads.title: Gottlieb Devils Dare Pinball Machine Project
ads.description: Cabinet and populated playfield, no backbox.. in very good condition.. all wiring and mechs intact..
